title: The Whimsical Two-Legged Stool Mod
description: Adds an amazing piece of furniture to make your homes more lively.
body:
Adds amazing pieces of furniture to make your homes more lively.
Releases for newer versions and fabric soon if I remember to do so.
Huge credit to the original inspiration/reference to the original model and the person who made it, Joachim Bornemann! This literally wouldn't exist without him lol
